response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-leading C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Demonstrated open-source leadership and technical mentoring through workshops and community projects
Proven ability to build and deploy scalable systems using Kubernetes, CI/CD, and distributed architectures
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience (early roles), far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or managing internal infrastructure at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering mentoring or architectural ownership
